name: Who&When Pro: Can LLMs Really Attribute Failures in AI Agents?
summary: arXiv:2607.09996v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Automated failure attribution uses LLMs to identify where and why agentic systems fail. As agents become more capable, their failures become subtler,...
description: arXiv:2607.09996v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Automated failure attribution uses LLMs to identify where and why agentic systems fail. As agents become more capable, their failures become subtler, making automated attribution increasingly important. We introduce Who&When Pro, a large-scale benchmark for automated failure attribution in agentic systems. Using a strictly controlled pipeline...
author: Jiale Liu, Huajun Xi, Shaokun Zhang, Yifan Zeng, Tianwei Yue, Chi Wang, Jian Kang, Qingyun Wu, Huazheng Wang
